title: Yoko Matcha Swiss Minimal
source_attribution: YOKO Matcha · Premium Japanese · Swiss-style packaging poster
copyright_notice: Reference for design study. Not for redistribution.
typography_summary: Geometric sans display + sans tracked caps small (4 corners)
composition_summary: Symmetric 4-corner grid + central display + bottom hero
why_good: Swiss minimalism radical — display geometric YOKO em centre, hero embaixo
Top corners + bottom corners labels tracked = 4-corner grid editorial
Cream bg + black display + matcha green = palette restrita 3 cores
Premium ceremonial grade messaging sem ser commercial
caveats: Estilo Swiss/japanese é distante de Só Rio (que é mais hospitality-warm). Useful como referência de RESTRAINT extreme — quão minimal pode ir
